error_signature: Workflow shows card data is not changing
title: Kanban card move not updating workflow data
symptom: When dragging a card from one column to another, the visual change occurs, but the workflow does not reflect the updated card data.
not_this_if: Data refreshes correctly after moving the card
root_cause: The workflow is not capturing the updated state of the card because it is referencing the wrong data points. Instead of using the entire 'Event.item', the workflow needs to focus on specific properties like 'id' and 'Event.to' to correctly update the card's status.
fix_steps: In the workflow, change the selection from 'Event.item' to 'Event.id' and 'Event.to'.
Ensure that the JSON data is correctly formatted in the Request step.
agent_instruction: Update the workflow to reference 'Event.id' and 'Event.to' for accurate card movement tracking.
